entry.title: SAP ABAP Proxy to PO - large data error
entry.content:
Hi

I have an ABAP Consumer Proxy interface. When i call with data size i.eg <SAP:MessageSizeTotal>86626719</SAP:MessageSizeTotal> it´s doing okay. 

But when i do a similar call but with size:

<SAP:MessageSizeTotal>124938066</SAP:MessageSizeTotal>

I get an 500 Network Connection Broken in SXMB_MONI? 

I have changed icm/HTTP/max_request_size_KB to 204800 in ABAP
And messaging.largemessage.threshold to 204800 in SAP PO

With no luck. Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Tax code template
entry.content:
got you the resolution for this question?

 

I have the same problem.

"error": {
        "code": -5002,
        "message": {
            "lang": "en-us",
            "value": "Enter valid code  [OSTC.TfcId]"
        }
    }

entry.title: Message No. CPCL_VERS106 - No inspection type for origin 03 for material PPA045 plant 0075 active
entry.content:
I have activated the inspection type for the material. 

But still throwing this error while releasing the shopfloor routing in MSFR1

Any idea?

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam: Una Experiencia que Paraguay Necesita
entry.content:
Hola, saludos desde Brasil. Es muy bueno que haya una iniciativa en Paraguay para fortalecer la comunidad local.

Codejam es un buen tema, y es un evento tradicional de SAP para llevar nuevas ideas por el mundo. Tuvimos un roadshow en América del Sur en 2024

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-roadshow-2024-latin-america-edition-august-8th-21st-2024/ba-p/13710015

Creo que vale contactar a los desarrolladores que presentaron el CodeJam y incluir a Asunción en la agenda de este año 2025. Un abrazo.

entry.title: sap system allowing lock same object in multiple Transport

Hello Team,

sap system allowing lock same object in multiple Transport

 

DS1 system DS1K900906 & DS1K926439

entry.title: SAP BUILD APP: Error in the build(iOS)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to deploy from SAP Build Apps|Free Edition an application and the system generates an error:

AB version: 3.5.0
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true  npxrnv repackage-ios -p ios -s standalone_adhoc -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-120773\"" --offline --templates-path /Users/iosbuilder/templates --keychain-path /Users/iosbuilder/Library/Keychains/AppGyver-120773-db --provisioning-profile-path /Users/iosbuilder/current/certs/bs_secrets_120773_a4a2eb08-224c-4c6f-a9dc-89cd6810084d.mobileprovision --signing-identity "iPhone Distribution:" 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv repackage-ios -p ios -s standalone_adhoc -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-120773\"" --offline --templates-path /Users/iosbuilder/templates --keychain-path /Users/iosbuilder/Library/Keychains/AppGyver-120773-db --provisioning-profile-path /Users/iosbuilder/current/certs/bs_secrets_120773_a4a2eb08-224c-4c6f-a9dc-89cd6810084d.mobileprovision --signing-identity "iPhone Distribution"

 

The p12 certificate and mobileprovision are correct.
Can you help me solve the error?

Thank you

entry.title: BAPI / Simulate API alternative for BAPI: BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have a requirement to mass create and mass change the price condition data for configurable materials by uploading Excel file, we want to run a simulate/test run before committing the the change/create.

In ECC there is a BAPI : 'BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS'  for create/change and we could commit or rollback the changes once its executed, similarly is there any alternative BAPI or Simulate API for create/change pricing condition before the POST/PUT call in SAP Public cloud.

Thank you in advance

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Supply Chain API

entry.title: Re: Bienvenidos al grupo de la comunidad en Paraguay 🇵🇾 - Asunción y Ciudad del este
entry.content: Feliz de saber sobre este grupo en Paraguay. Aquí en Brasil, ya hemos tenido eventos y reuniones de la Comunidad SAP en Lima, Bogotá y Buenos Aires. Espero recibir noticias de grandes encuentros de la comunidad en Asunción. ¡Éxitos por ahí!

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?

Hi

I am from Israel

entry.title: Clean core extensibility: what are "types of scope for software (Delivered, Required, Specific)"
entry.content:
In the quiz of the unit "Getting Started with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Extensions, and Clean Core" of the SAP Tutorial Practicing Clean Core Extensibility For SAP S/4HANA Cloud", there is this question and solution:

Question:

Which of the following are different types of scope that exist for software?

Solution:

The different types of scope that exist for software are Delivered, Required, and Specific.

What does it mean? Is it a screen field? Of which application? What is the lesson corresponding to this question? Do you have any documentation link about it?

Thank you.

Sandra

NB: bonus question, is

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Shaik Azmathulla - January 2025 Edition
entry.content: +@maheshpalavalli @SyambabuAllu  @RanjithKumar @KatherineKenneally @KunalBansal - Thank you, team, for your support in all perspectives.

entry.title: New Learning Journey: Utilizing SAP CX AI Toolkit for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm Charis from SAP CX Product Learning team and I am excited to announce the launch of our brand new learning journey:

Utilizing the SAP CX AI Toolkit in SAP Commerce Cloud

This learning journey provides a comprehensive overview of SAP CX AI Toolkit for SAP Commerce Cloud persona. It seeks to empower learners to deploy intelligent automation with the SAP CX AI Toolkit and create an engaging smart shopping experience for customers.

Learning Objectives:

  • Describe the role of the SAP CX AI Toolkit within the SAP CX portfolio, its key features, and the associated business benefits in SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Perform the essential steps to access the SAP CX AI Toolkit and establish a connection to SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Utilize the essential features of SAP CX AI Toolkit within SAP Commerce Cloud for their business use cases.

The learning journey consists of 3 units:

  • Introducing SAP CX AI Toolkit for SAP Commerce Cloud: A high level introduction to SAP CX AI Toolkit, and its key features for SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Connecting SAP CX AI Toolkit with SAP Commerce Cloud: This unit guides you through accessing your SAP CX AI Toolkit tenant and configuring its integration with SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Navigating SAP CX AI Toolkit Within SAP Commerce Cloud: This unit walks you through using the SAP CX AI Toolkit within SAP Commerce Cloud to generate product attributes and descriptions, search product data with natural language and image recognition, enhance or create product images, and generate marketing content such as social media posts, blog entries, and product banner text.

The learning journey contains very informative content provided in text, diagrams, videos. At the end of each unit, you will be called to answer on quiz questions which will test your understanding on the topic.

The Learning Journey is available for everyone and it's free! Complete this learning journey and earn a verifiable SAP Authorized Badge on your learning profile!

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have successfully connected the Cloud ALM with Analytics Cloud to get more detailed analytics from an implementation project. We can see the tables (e.g. requirements, tasks, tests) etc in SAC, but we haven't been able to figure out where the associations are stored.

For example we like to query all the requirements and see all tasks associated to them. Can anyone help us and let us know where the associations between the tables are held?

Thanks

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Production Order Settlement with TECO/DLV Status
entry.content:
Please provide the solution if you find it.
We are facing the exact same problem with a process order that should be settled in December 2024. The system is rejecting it and only accepting it in January 2025.

entry.title: Re: Payment xml file rejection by Bank - OrgnlPmtInfId>NOTMAPPED</OrgnlPmtInfId
entry.content:
SEPA only supports EUR not USD. Are you using the CGI file?

 

Also check your file on SWIFT in the MyStandards test suite

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
@Chedva it is wonderful to meet you in the community. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia.

May I ask your area of interests and expertise? Please be sure to check out the many interest groups and join the engagement e.g., Application Development - SAP Community

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit-upgraded to release 202...
entry.content:
Hello,

You may be unable to see the objects due to updates in the latest SAP S/4HANA release. Generally, a project should be associated with a single version of SAP S/4HANA. After an upgrade, it is advisable to create a new project.

 

Regards,

Jose M.

entry.title: Re: Generation of dependent programs/objects (where-used)
entry.content: Understood, apologizes. Yes, the concept of where-used lists and ABAP Load regeneration is different (cross-reference information are stored in different tables and generated by different programs).

entry.title: Trial Integration Suite in Singapore has deployment issues when using security material
entry.content:
Hi,

Since the past two days I've had problems with deployment of integration flows that uses security material.

Even a simple flow using basic authentication HTTP request-reply fails to deploy. The error returned is:

[CONTENT]
[CONTENT_DEPLOY]
[ErrorUnresolvedDependency] : 
{
    "message": "ERROR",
    "childMessageInstances": [
        {
            "message": "EXCEPTION",
            "parameters": [
                "java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException"
            ]
        },
        {
            "message": "UNRESOLVED",
            "parameters": [
                "(&(keystore=default)(objectClass=com.sap.esb.security.KeyCertificateAccessor))"
            ]
        },
        {
            "message": "UNRESOLVED",
            "parameters": [
                "(objectClass=com.sap.esb.camel.http.ahc.configurer.AHCConfigFactory)"
            ]
        }
    ]
}

The tenant I use is in a newly created trial subaccount hosted in Singapore on Azure.

Is anyone else experiencing the same problem?

Best regards,
Jacob

entry.title: Re: Generation of dependent programs/objects (where-used)
entry.content:
The program name is TOUCHTAB.

You may also use SGEN with a transport request containing LIMU TABD MARA.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit-upgraded to release 202...

entry.title: Re: How to configure the Change record and capture the ch...
entry.content: Have they been done with a change number that has been generated out of the Change Record "Change Number Handling" that was configured?

entry.title: How to extract the PO Long Text from Material Master in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
We are in need of the CDS view to create the report for Material Long description which is stored in the material master view "Purchase order Text". This information is very essential for our day-to-day operations.

Your earliest action on this will be highly appreciated.

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to extract the PO Long Text from Material Master...
entry.content:
I have checked our internal systems of 2502 for a CDS view in how to extract the PO Long Text from Material master and this currently not available. 

There is an work around with API that will allow this SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

But if you would like this added a feature request will need to be raised. KBA: 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 ).

entry.title: Re: How to configure the Change record and capture the changes done in master data
entry.content: Have they been done with a change number that has been generated out of the Change Record "Change Number Handling" that was configured? No Let me try and confirm. I thought ER itself is enough to record the changes. Also I used Impact analysis button in Change record app. Will try to configure the impact analyze model. Pls share if there are links on process flow to record the changes against ECN and ER

entry.title: In EWM while using Putaway strategy system determining always a empty bin
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have configured the EWM Putaway strategy, used storage type search sequence and BIN determination.

I have maintained the Control Indicator also in the product. Still, while executing it is always searching the empty bin and showing in the WT. My storage type Putaway rule is "2 i.e addition to existing stock"

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello,

The new F90 entry did not work as expected. When I split the entry between F38 delimited 2024-06-24 and F90 effective from 2024-06-25,

the wage type was not reported at all. However, when I put the wage type in both F38 and F90 for the entire year, it reported the full amount in both.

Can someone shed some light on how to get this to work correctly?

entry.title: SAC Backend-Login Popup changed to Browser Dropdown
entry.content:
Dear Community

Recently a login behavior has changed in the SAC. This is about the standard SAC internal popup when logging in to a backend system via live connection without SSO, since recently and only on a specific SAC tenant the user details are now requested with a browser Dropdown.

As it used to be:

How it is now:

 

any idea why?

Backend is S4 private Cloud

SAP Analytics Cloud 

Greetings Cornelius

entry.title: MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK writes change log without change
entry.content:
hello SAP brains,

Recently I wrote a WebService (oDataV2) to perform material master updates from an external system. More precisely, an update of the MRP group (MARC-DISGR). This update is carried out via the MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK module. We now have the following problem that this change document writes, but we have no change to MARC. Have you ever encountered similar problems or are there any solutions / explanations?

 

    call function 'MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK' "#EC CI_USAGE_OK[2438006]
      exporting
        flag_muss_pruefen   = 'X'
        p_kz_no_warn        = 'N'
        kz_prf              = space
        user                = sy-uname
        suppress_array_read = 'X'
        flg_mass            = 'X'
        kz_dispo            = 'X'
        call_mode           = ''
        sperrmodus          = 'E'
      tables
        amara_ueb           = it_mara_ueb
        amarc_ueb           = it_marc_ueb
        amerrdat            = rt_return
      exceptions
        kstatus_empty       = 1
        tkstatus_empty      = 2
        t130m_error         = 3
        internal_error      = 4
        too_many_errors     = 5
        update_error        = 6
        error_message       = 98
        others              = 99.

    lt_mara_ueb = value #(
      for <ls_mara> in lt_mrp_group
      where ( error is initial )
      ( matnr = <ls_mara>-matnr
        tcode = 'MM02'
        tranc = <ls_mara>-tranc )
    ).

    lt_marc_ueb = value #(
      for <ls_mara> in lt_mrp_group
      where ( error is initial )
      ( matnr = <ls_mara>-matnr
        werks = <ls_mara>-werks
        disgr = <ls_mara>-disgr
        tranc = <ls_mara>-tranc )
    ).

entry.title: Re: EWM : RF skip cursor movement and move to next screen
entry.content: But dont you want scan the HU? If not then this can be achieved by setting up the Verification control in IMG. This can then be also be setup together with warehouse process types.

entry.title: How to fetch the document from Document Management Service using API's in SAP CAP application?
entry.content:
We have a PDF's which are stored in BTP Document Management Service in which we are using the API https://api.sap.com/api/DownloadFileApi/tryout to read the contents of the PDF.

The output/result on querying DMS to the service returns the result in gibberish manner. As shown below 

 

 

The requirement is to have the output in human readable format which we again need to pass to GenAI for further processing. Could you please help/guide us how can we have the results in human readable text/string. Unfortunately, we tried node.js libraries to parse the query result content but were unsuccessful doing so.

Can anyone suggest how to resolve this?

entry.title: Re: Spool not generated for custom report only for prod mode.
entry.content:
Hi @ArunaShibane did you check if the same issues (test mode flag set -> spool gets generated, prod mode flag set -> no spool gets generated) if you call the report yourself in SE38?

Cause your description of the issue sounds like a simple mistake in the logic of handling the test/prod mode flag which you can test very easily by running the report in the debugger (works in prod environment too 😉 ).

entry.title: Are you looking for administration and configuration tools to manage Concur Request. Concur Request?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Getting Started with Concur Request Professional for Administrators learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey is designed to to introduce you to the common administration and configuration tools, to manage Concur Request. Concur Request is a powerful tool that allows users to document and preauthorize upcoming expenses before they occur. This allows for better budgeting and allocation of funds. Concur Request accommodates both travel and non-travel related expenses.

Learning objectives
Upon completion of this learning journey, administrators will be able to administer and configure Concur Request using common tools such as List Management, Audit Rules, Email Reminders, and more. 

Prerequisites

  • Administrators should have a firm understanding of how Concur Request works as a business user.
    Review the learning journey, Getting Started with Concur Professional Request for Business Users, before completing this learning journey.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Override first date for individual items in a sales o...
entry.content: What you suggested is not standard but a customized validation.

entry.title: Re: DMC POD Plugin local development environment in VS Code
entry.content:
Hi @zaunerd ,

Use below code to call the production process while running the application locally. This will automatically route to correct destination when plugin running in the DM POD.

let paylod = {
 plant: this.getPlant()
//add other parameters
}
this.post('pe/api/v1/process/processDefinitions/start', paylod).then(res=>{
  console.log(res)
})

Please install latest version of dmc-local-app-router using command `npm i -g dmc-local-app-router@latest`

you might already have below route details configured in your local-configs.json file. if not add them

{
       "[dev]":{
        "port": 8086,
        "routes": [
            {
                "route": "/api/:servicePath*",
                "uri": "https://api.test.eu20.dmc.cloud.sap",
                "auth": "papiAuth"
            }
        ],
        "auths": {
            "papiAuth": {
                "authUrl": "<token_url>/oauth/token",
                "clientId": "<clientid>",
                "clientSecret": "<client_secret>"
            }
        }
       }
    }

update your package.json file start command with latest command

"start": "dmclar start --profile dev"
for more details on latest version of dmc-local-app-router, refer documentation

entry.title: Which API can be used to create Service Package (ESLH and ESLL) related to Contract (EKKO and EKPO)
entry.content:
Hi,

Which API can be used in S4 on-premise system to create Service Package (tables ESLH and ESLL) related to Contract (tables EKKO and EKPO). I'm trying to use API_SERVICE_CONTRACT_SRV but it is not working as expected, it's returning empty responses with status 200.

entry.title: How to determine the RFC type
entry.content: Hello, how to determine the RFC type currently used in the system if it is Asynchronous, Synchronous, etc. Which tcode should i check?

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Hi @diego_renzi,

this issue is often based on a missing content configuration in the SAP Build Apps HTML5 application. Specifically, the `semanticObject` and `action` parameters are often missing. These parameters are not strictly required in the CDM content in all cases and therefore are not mandatory in SAP Build Apps. However, they are necessary for successful integration between SAP Build Work Zone and SAP Mobile Start for HTML5 Apps.

Here's some additional context to clarify why your apps work in the SAP Build Work Zone Web Client but not in SAP Mobile Start:

  • In the Web Client: HTML5 Apps are launched with the `embedded` launch type, meaning they run within the same shell (unlike when launched in a new browser tab). In this scenario, `semanticObject` and `action` are not required.
  • In SAP Mobile Start: The `embedded` launch type is not supported, as the native app lacks a web shell it runs in. When no native app is unavailable (which is the case here), HTML5 Apps are launched with the `central` launch type, which opens a new web shell and requires `semanticObject` and `action` to be injected into the shell for the app to run. Without these parameters, the app cannot launch in this setup.

Adding the `semanticObject` and `action` parameters to the app in SAP Build Apps and refreshing the HTML5 content int the SAP Build Work Zone Content-Channel-Manager should resolve the problem.

I also created the SAP Note 3560911 for that scenario

Best regards,
Sascha Kiefer

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:

entry.title: Custom Services UI feature in Sales Service Cloud v2
entry.content:
Hello together,

does anybody know if there is already a sample somewhere with a CAP Service and the uploaded JSON for this feature in Sales Service Cloud v2?

custom serviceui generation

https://www.youtube.com/live/VUp4nt3zNCg?t=4110s 

Thanks and best regards,

Julian

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba integration with SAGE ERP (Third Party)
entry.content:
You will have to use CIG integration in Mediated Connectivity i.e via a middleware.

  • Outbound document (SAGE to Ariba): custom dev to provide this doc payload (Master Data, PO ack, GR Ack etc...) in CIG format 
  • Inbound Document (Ariba to SAGE): CIG will transform the Ariba cxml document into a xml document like, then in your middleware, you can transform these documents into the format supported by your SAGE

It is doable, but you need to have a good team of developer, Also one of the option bypassing CIG, is to use the different webservices (https://help.sap.com/doc/631084d43b6a4216b391ec37ce94733b/cloud/en-US/ws_index.htm) or API (https://api.sap.com/products/SAPAriba/apis/all) that Ariba has.

entry.title: Re: Comprehensive Guide to Unit Testing in CAP
entry.content:
Thanks for it. 

Really interesting. I applied it successfully in one project, definitely I'm going to use it. But, the point is that the coverage is got from the testing scripts. How can I manage the coverage of custom handlers? There is a way? 

Thank you

entry.title: CJCF Carry Forward Committment
entry.content:
Dear all,

We are trying to carry forward a project commitment from 2023 to 2024. However, the system is updating both the commitment column and the remaining order value column to the extent of the commitment amount in 2024, which is strange and also the assigned value is incorrect in S/4 Hana system.

It Would be highly appriciate  for any input on this issue.

Thanks .

V.Krishnamoorthy

entry.title: Re: Performance is poor for Select query on MBEW Table
entry.content:
Hi, Prince

I think nobody helps you. We have the same problems with view MBV_MBEW.

To get a stock for single material and for all plants where material exists system need 30 seconds that is very poor performance, and we didn't use for all entries clause in query. I created CDS which return needed information from MBV_MBEW and performance is very bad. I did little investigation and noticed that fields salk3 and lbkum are calculated from accdoca extract on the fly, that is cause and you can't do anything with that.

entry.title: Re: List of object types - SAP Business One
entry.content: Great . Thanks

entry.title: Re: Embedded Reports in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content:
Hello,

I found this possibility in Ticket part, but not in sales quote.

Is this functionality available in Sales Quote?

Thanks

entry.title: HCM_CATS_V1_B_TS_VALIDATION
entry.content:
Hi all

We want to limit the maximum number of hours per day or per week in the "manage my timesheet" app, using the BAdI HCM_CATS_V1_B_TS_VALIDATION. 

Once you do a Save & Submit, the time entries are written to the database. Then when you then add new time entries, internal table "timeentries" only contains these new time entries - not those time entries already saved to the database. 

Example: you enter a time entry for 6:30 then Submit (time entries will contain just this one record). Then enter a further time entry for 2:30 and Submit (again timeentries will contain just this one record). So, there will be no error message for exceeded hours.

To meet our business requirement, the custom logic needs to be enhanced to also check for existing time entries on the database and adding these to the calculation of lv_totalhours. For this you can use CDS View I_TIMESHEETRECORD and read records based on PERNR / WORKDATE.

Does anyone have example coding for this scenario? And how can you involve the maximum number of hours that was maintained in the "manage workforce" app for a certain user? 

In the post https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/badi-hcm-cats-v1-b-ts-validation/qaq-p/12349770 is mentioned that BAdI HCM_CATS_V1_B_TS_VALIDATION checks and validates only the duration of the last single timesheet entry. It was planned for release 2005 (Q2/2020) the BAdI will be enhanced to check and validate against all the timesheet entries for the day. Anyone who knows if this is done or when this will be enabled? 

Thanks! 

Best regards, 
Annelies

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting - Need help to configure Group Journal Entry approver workflow on premise
entry.content: Thanks Dana_Pu, I managed to set up the workflow now, but the workflow item is not reaching the Group Journal approval inbox of the team member. Does the Group Journal Approver need a specific role assigned to receive the workflow item? If yes, what is it called?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 is now available.

To access the final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access it.

For you as a customer, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

You can use the commenting feature for What’s New. With this feature, authors can evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Re: DM Core Plugin Extension - how to avoid deploying all...
entry.content:
Hello Deep,

In the Core Plugin Extension, there is a folder called designer in Plugins. Inside this folder, there is a component.json file. In this file, in the extensions>inclusions section, you specify in which plants and Pods each plugin that will be extended will be active. With the right settings, you will have solved your problem.

Best Regards,

Emre Yoldas

entry.title: Where can I learn to develop and monitor interfaces and execute error handling in a single framework
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Managing SAP Application Interface Framework learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey presents SAP Application Interface Framework (AIF) and provides an in-depth knowledge of managing complex application interfaces and handling errors with a high level of customization. It empowers learners to monitor and map both inbound and outbound IDocs and proxies, use the file adapter, and explore advanced features revolving around interface variants and simplified application.
Applicable for S/4HANA and S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, developers will be able to:

  • Understanding how to customize and effectively use the error handling capabilities of AIF.
  • Gaining proficiency in the creation of interfaces using AIF.
  • Learning how to use AIF specific monitoring tools.
  • Understanding the use and advantage of AIF Index Tables
  • Developing skills to monitor and map both inbound and outbound IDocs.
  • Learning how to monitor and map both inbound and outbound Proxies.
  • Understanding and using the file adapter.
  • Gaining knowledge on interface determination and its usage.
  • Understanding and implementing interface variants.
  • Learning to use the analyzer effectively in AIF.

Prerequisites
Recommended

  • ABAP knowledge 
  • Experience with integration scenarios

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Embedded Reports in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content: Yes, this functionality also available for Sales Quote:

entry.title: ICMR - Manage Assignments values different from Reconciliation Balances
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'm currently trying to figure out the ICMR process. The configuration has been made, but I'm not currently understanding the meaning of the values showed on the apps "Reconciliation Balances" and "Manage Assignments", per example:

1- The only column I have configured to be shown is "Up to Now (YTD)" which should accumulate all the values from January to December. But on December it's only showing me the December value + November value, disregarding the values from January to October.

2- In December per example, on Reconciliation Balances app, my Leading Unit amount is 20.000€, same as my Partner Unit, resulting on a 0€ difference. But if I jump to the Manage Assignments app, and select the all unassigned documents from both my Leading and Partner Unit, i have a difference of 202,96€. Shouldn't this difference be represented on the previous app, since the column "Up to Now (YTD)" aggregates all values from the beginning to the end of the year?

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Monte Carlo Simulation
entry.content:
Hi @MickeyM ,

Glad to see that you are excited to try compass out!

Regarding your questions:

  1. Compass supports relationships defined between KPIs via the account dimension formula or hierarchy, and the formulas defined via calculated measures in model. Data Actions are currently not supported but it is an area which we are looking into.
  2. The prediction results meant are actually the results which are written back into a planning model from a predictive scenario. (There is no integration direct integration between predictive scenarios and compass). As compass simulates straight off a SAC model, it is possible for user to chose the predicted result in the planning model as the data version to be used for the compass simulation. 

    As explained in the blog, time series prediction works differently from a compass (Monte Carlo) simulation, hence when considering which influences/drivers to use in each case, the business intention behind should be the decisive criteria, i.e. in time series prediction: "which influencers will help to give more accuracy to the future projection if things develop at the same rate/cycle", and for compass: "What happens if things change for certain drivers within a given range?".
    Whether the same driver could be used for both cases is technically dependent on (1) whether there is enough historical data for time series prediction and (2) whether it is also defined in a mathematical relationship for compass simulation. But the first business / conceptual question here should be the "why should the same drivers be used" and "what are the results sought".

Hope this helps!

Cheers,
Chen Nee

entry.title: Hi allCustomer did a client copy from Production server to create a new pre production system
entry.content: After copy users start testing and they realized workflows, rules, substitutions and maybe other things are missed. How can I know what else is missed on the copy and how can I solve missing workflows and rules?

entry.title: Re: FAGLL03H- Material G/L - Material group column not showing in G/L line Item #fagll03h
entry.content: (HANA) field is ACDOCA-MATKL_MM

entry.title: Re: MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK writes change log without change
entry.content:
Please check if SAP-KBA can provide a solution or explanation for your issue.
KBAs 3351985 - Change document update problems for long text in Material/Article Master - SAP for Me and 3440880 - Incorrect change documents for MARC-STAWN and MARC-EXPME - SAP for Me provide some more information ...

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: Configuring the proxy CO_CRM_ISX_CC_CATALOG_SERVICES
entry.content:
Dear CRM experts, 

In an integrated CRM - ERP - CC landscape I have the need to use the v3 of the Catalog WebService of CC and thus need to configure the CO_CRM_ISX_CC_CATALOG_SERVICES. 

When I change the URL endpoint on Soamanager I get the below error:

When I try to create a completely new logical port and provide the endpoint of this WS, I get the below error:

Any idea, hint? 

Thank you,

Doris

entry.title: Is Resource Scheduling Job possible to schedule for more tahn 2 months
entry.content:
While scheduling a job using Manage Schedule App>Generate Recurring Schedule in SAP S4 Public cloud while setting the schedule getting an error cannot schedule for a duration of more than 2 months.

 

Do anyone has any idea is this a system condition by default in S4 public cloud and can we change it by anyways.

 

Any help will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #18
entry.content:
I have a couple of questions as well a suggestion, having watched the presentation by Hans-Georg Klotzek on Jobs in ABAP Cloud.

The "Run class for testing" button was probably behind the speaker image in the recording, so you cannot see how it looks. It would be good to activate the tooltip option when presenting, to provide a clearer indication of commands:

Now my first question: is this feature already available in the current BTP version? If so, other than an up-to-date ADT, do we need anything to enable it? I've scoured the menus but could not see where it is.

Second question: is there a way to write in "log" and "results" in the "application jobs" app?

Or should we rather use application logs?

entry.title: SAP Best Practices Succession Management MDF Position-Based Nomination Method / Talent Card
entry.content:
After trying to do the upgrade "SAP Best Practices Succession Management Metadata Framework Position-Based Nomination Method" from Upgrade center  we keep getting the same error:

Exception Occured while executing the class, BestPracticesManageTalentCard , Exception:
    Failed to configure talent card.
        Unable to find the following field value: Start Date.,

Do you know how to fix this error?

Thank you in advence

entry.title: Re: Starting a career in SAP finance
entry.content:
Hi @SadeO 

Please check our C_TS4FI SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Financial Accounting 
site.
There you find a "How to prepare section.
It contains the list of topics that may be covered within this SAP Certification and the courses that touches on these topics. Its accuracy does not constitute a legitimate claim. SAP reserves the right to update the exam content (topics, items, weighting) at any time and eh recommended learning journey for preparation. 
For self-elevation we also gathered sample questions.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: RAP OData v4 Web-API metadata nullable action parameter (abstract entity)
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I already asked a general question about the nullable option here and found solutions for properties based on CDS entities and custom entities. Now I need a solution for the properties of action parameter structures defined as abstract entities. How can I make the nullable="false" disappear in this case?

 

We're on a S/4 HANA oP 2023 release.

entry.title: Re: openSAP has moved: Find over 100 former openSAP courses on the SAP Learning site
entry.content: I just found out about the Open SAP coming to an end as of July 30, 2024, and all certifications are no longer available.  I took the Generative AI course, with the certification issued in December 2023.  I downloaded my Generative AI certification right after this date, and put it on my LinkedIn page.  However, my LinkedIn page does not now show this credential, and only shows the "Show credential" link, which when clicked, only goes to a series of splash pages about Learning.sap.com.  The link to my credential is broken.  This is not right at all, as my certification was earned and posted on my LinkedIn page way before July 30, 2024.   Is this going to be fixed?

entry.title: Re: Performance is poor for Select query on MBEW Table
entry.content: Hi @Kostiantyn_K, thanks for the information. I am not sure why SAP didn't respond on this. Is there any solution for this or any recommendations from SAP. Table like MBEW have huge records in our system, performance is the bottleneck.

entry.title: Are you an administrators and want to learn how to work with Invoice Pay in Concur Invoice Standard?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Working with Invoice Pay in Concur Invoice Standard learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey, for administrators, focuses on configuring and maintaining payment configurations using Automated Clearing House (ACH), Virtual Cards, or Checks in Concur Invoice Standard with the Invoice Pay service.

Learning objectives
After completing this course, administrators will be able to identify and explain the key features of Concur Invoice Payment Manager including how to configure and maintain ACH, Virtual Cards, and Check payments, to ensure payments are made accurately and on-time to vendors. 

Prerequisites

  • Administrators should have a basic understanding of Concur Invoice and the Procure to Pay process.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: FAGLL03H- Material G/L - Material group column not showing in G/L line Item #fagll03h
entry.content:
Do you see the field filled when displaying document (field ACDOCA-MATKL_MM, you could look with SE16n)

If not, did you add it to the report with 2512883 - Financials Line Item Browsers: BADI FAGL_LIB - Update (or blog How to extend transaction FAGLL03H with custom fields)

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud embedded in SAP Business One on premise
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

The client has requested the possibility of displaying a story created in SAC within Business One. We assume it would need to be done with Single Sign-On so that it automatically connects the SAP user to SAC.

We have serious doubts about whether this is feasible. Does anyone know how this could be achieved? If it is possible, would the security applied in SAC through DACs in the dimensions remain intact when embedding it in Business One?

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Prorate based on Months not days
entry.content:
Hi team, 
we have a requirement in which prorate should be calculated as per months not days.
is it possible to calculate depending on the months?

valid from 1st March to 31st Dec 
Billing reference date is 1st Jan
Yearly billing cycle
Price for year = 1200
prorate calculation on months (1200/12)*10 = 1000
prorate calculation on days (1200/365)*306 = 1006.02
SAP Subscription Billing 
thanks
Ankit

entry.title: Re: HCM_CATS_V1_B_TS_VALIDATION
entry.content:
You should check in your version : Is the TIMEENTRIES table parameter active and used?

*-- Important Note:
*-- This BAdI is called once for each TIMEENTRY, so your validation checks should be based on madatory parameter - TIMEENTRY.
*-- Use optional parameter - TIMEENTRIES only in cases where the currently processing timeentry has dependency on other timeentrties which are posted along with it.
*-- Example : Multiple Time Entries submitted by the user on a day should not exceed the target hours of the day.

entry.title: How to frame/shadow a specific cell within a table in a Smartform?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I'm presenting a simple table in a smartform. However - I need to make one column within the LINETYPE with both the frame and shadow of another color. I'm getting an error message: "Boxes/shadings are not allowed in tables".

I remember that it used to be possible to use the draw option in the table definition but in ECC 6.0 seems that it's impossible.

Any ideas?..

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: LE-TRA versus Transportation Management
entry.content: Hi Dominik, many thanks for your answers. Due to freight orders: Our customer is packing into delivery HUs. Can I allocate this HUs directly to the freigt order or do I have to use FUs? If FUs are needed in the FO how do they have the correct packed products?

entry.title: Re: Modify the Financial Review booklet
entry.content: That's not it. You need to apply below SNOTE to your system. Only this helped in our case. https://me.sap.com/notes/3520907/E

entry.title: Re: Issue with nested if-then formula in compensation wor...
entry.content:
Hi @swagatikapanda 

Are there editable fields other than standard fields on your template (even if not referenced in the formula) ?

I just fixed this issue yesterday which is the same behavior than what you describe (scroll up to see the problem as it was explained by Phil).

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/dates-and-roundings-in-compensation/bc-p/13987307/highlight/true#M8166

You can also go back up and look at Example 5 where I inserted the code.

In summary, you will need to twist your formula one way or another and its impossible to do without knowing which on-screen editable fields are on the template.

Thanks 

Xavier

entry.title: What is the significance of Operation detail verification in Order type dependent parameter - PI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you please explain the  significance of Operation detail verification in Order type dependent parameter - Process Industry as attached in the picture below.

In help it states that "All the data contained in the operation detail screens is to be checked when transferring operations from the routing into the order", but my question is :- The same happens when an Order is created with Production version, then what is it's significance?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Activate Joule for SAP SuccessFactors HCM
entry.content: Thanks Fabian for the information, it is relevant for the activation of Joule in our clients.

entry.title: Re: Modify the Financial Review booklet
entry.content: Thanks, ilter_yilmazli. We implemented the SNOTE, it still doesn't work. I think this is something for SAP development support.

entry.title: Re: RISE sooner than later - Part 2
entry.content:
Hello @simonpolovina1 ,

Thanks for the comment, and I TOTALLY echo your comment and observation. In an ideal situation, or in a governance-based approach, we could "insist" that the strategy be defined even before getting into any solution mode.

In the context of the RISE and SAP migration initiative, we probably have to consider a more pragmatic approach. The reason why I am saying this is because, as you know, most of the SAP customers have solution architects and functional experts working on the system for long years and can easily feel the excitement and urgency to transition into S4/HANA directly. SAP has given good tools for evaluation and direct migration of ECC, and this is relatively "risk-free" in their point of view.

This is where collaboration becomes very important—to make each stakeholder and persona involved in the process buy in to the benefits of defining the strategy, defining the key value divers, defining target state etc., before jumping into solution mode. The enterprise architecture mindset should be embodied into all, to be sure they validates any new processes or solutions in the context of strategy, business capabilities, etc.

Best regards,

Jimjees

entry.title: Filter issue with story reporting
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a table in story reporting to analyze a custom portlet. I was specifically trying to see which user has an entry in said portlet. I realized that a row/entry/result was missing when scrolling through the table. However, when using the filter to find this entry, I could find it, even though it was not part of the results (it was not to be seen in the table or in the excel/csv export). 

Does anyone know how it is possible that the filter allows you to find a result, which isn't actually there?

Thanks

entry.title: can we use $select with where clause and $filter and $expand in a single odata query to SAP SF
entry.content: can someone share an example where we use a $select with where clause and then expand and filter the resultset in a single odata query

entry.content:

the possibility to add comments in What's New Viewer sounds especially interesting. But it doesn't work for me, despite being logged on to Help Portal. Can you give some further hints?  

Thank you and best regards,

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hello,

I am having some problems with the "Presentation Mode" that replaces the Digital Boardroom.
I have 3 Classic Stories and 1 DBR.
I converted the Classic Stories to Optimized mode. I started with the story with more pages and imported the pages from the other two stories.
The first problem I had is that if there are objects such as "Select Measure" and "Select Dimension" within the story that is being imported, these objects are lost when you do the import, forcing you to manually modify the story, which did not happen with the DBR.
This is obviously a problem and adds more work as most of the stories we have built have dynamic filters.
The second problem I have is that when I create the presentation by setting up the different Topic, the filters do not work with the tables within the dashboard, but work correctly with all the other objects, graphs and KPIs.
When I use the flat presentation that is provided by default, this problem does not occur.
Has anyone else experienced these issues?

Thanks in advance, 

Marsida

entry.title: Re: Modify the Financial Review booklet
entry.content:
v_23 this happened to us as well and we replicated some steps again and it fixed. Maybe you can try as well.

1- De-implement 3418650 and 3520907 together

2- Run SAP_BW_SETUP_INITIAL_S4HANA in the background from STC01 TCODE (SNOTE 3463494)

3- Implement 3418650 and 3520907 again

entry.title: Re: US taxing procedure TAXUSJ to 0TXUSX
entry.content: @ShreyaThank you for the information. What about change from External TAXUSX) to Internal (0TXUSJ)?
